title: ctenitis decomposita
intro: Ctenitis decomposita, also known as the composite ctenitis fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenitis decomposita include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Ctenitis decomposita is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and remedies.
